evals.prompt: Cart has one electric toothbrush and replacement heads pack. We want higher AOV and a checkout upsell. New launch is a travel case SKU. Margin ok for 15% on bundles.
evals.expected_output: Table rows: Main | Complement | Rationale | One-click copy; travel case tied to launch; heads as complement.
expectations: Includes a table with columns Main product, Complement, Bundle discount rationale, One-click add copy
Names toothbrush as anchor and at least one complement (heads and/or travel case)
Rationale ties to AOV or launch or combined ship
Reflects shopping-guide / bundle logic not random products

evals.prompt: Checkout bounce is brutal. Average cart is $38, free shipping at $50. Selling skincare — cleanser in cart, no moisturizer. Suggest bait and bundles.
evals.expected_output: Threshold bait + cleanser + moisturizer combo with mandatory four columns.
expectations: Addresses free-shipping gap with a low-friction add or bundle
Table includes Main product, Complement, Bundle discount rationale, One-click add copy
Moisturizer or mini/SKU as complement to cleanser
Mentions checkout bounce or incentive in rationale

evals.prompt: Write a meta description for our homepage only, 155 characters.
evals.expected_output: Meta description; no full bundle table required (should-not-trigger for heavy cart workflow).
expectations: Does not force the full four-column bundle table as primary output for a pure SEO meta request
May deliver meta description without mandatory Main+Complement+rationale+CTA block
Stays appropriate to homepage meta task
